story.errorboundary_desc: Click the button below to trigger an error.
story.markdown_sample:
# Markdown Preview

This is a **Markdown** component. It supports various elements:

## Typography
- **Bold text**
- *Italic text*
- ~~Strikethrough~~

## Lists
1. First item
2. Second item
   - Sub item A
   - Sub item B

## Code
Inline `const x = 10;` and blocks:

```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Tables
| Feature | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| GFM | Yes |
| Custom Styles | Yes |

---

> This is a quote.
story.marquee_welcome: Welcome to WIM UI! This is a flexible marquee component.
story.scrollarea_both_desc: This container has content that overflows both vertically and horizontally. ScrollArea handles both directions when scrollAxis="both" is set.
story.scrollarea_custom_desc: You can wrap any React elements inside ScrollArea.
story.scrollarea_scrolling_works: Scrolling works perfectly for complex layouts.
story.scrollprogress_h1: Scroll down to see the progress bar at the top
story.visuallyhidden_accessible: This text is visually hidden but will be read by screen readers.
